title: Illagers Uprising
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/928cb738711a25ca58cc0bc76c164c88a7ebefa5.png)

Illagers Uprising is a modpack inspired by the likes of minecraft dungeons,
adding dungeons throughout the world along with new illagers and pillager camps and structures, the illagers in this modpack have increased difficulty and raids are harder than before, adding new enemies to fight along the way

Illagers Uprising also includes many trinkets and artifacts you can use to help yourself survive and fight in this new world

along with trinkets comes many new craftable weapons and ranged artillery, anything from Scythes to Claymores, Longbows to Automatic Crossbows, lots of new gear to discover
and many new armors to equip yourself with, having their own buffs and debuffs
